_instructions.coordinate_system: IJK voxel indices [z, y, x] in the loaded volume (0-indexed)
notes: ostium_ijk: the origin point where the vessel branches off the aorta/LM
waypoints_ijk: 1–3 intermediate points guiding the path down the vessel (proximal segment only)
WARNING: This patient has only 149 slices (~74.5mm Z-span). Verify the proximal coronary segments are captured.
